prompt: Create a highly realistic miniature diorama photograph of a cute anime-style Japanese schoolgirl figure standing centered on a modern city sidewalk in bright daylight, posed full body facing the camera with both hands raised in cheerful peace signs. She has short light brown bob hair with a small top ponytail, a softly blurred featureless face, slim proportions, and wears a navy school blazer with white piping and crest badge, white shirt, red necktie, red tartan pleated skirt, navy ankle socks, and glossy brown loafers. The scene is a detailed urban street diorama with a cafe building on the left, a large white “CAFE” sign, blue awning, warm interior lights, potted plants, and one chalkboard menu listing four items: “Coffee,” “Latte,” “Cappuccino,” and “Cake.” Add a black streetlamp with a red vertical banner reading WELCOME TO CITY, leafy green trees lining the sidewalk, tactile yellow paving strips, tiled pavement, short metal bollards, a crosswalk and road on the right, metal guardrail in the foreground, glass office buildings and distant pedestrians in the background, plus additional red city banners and a billboard with a blurred portrait. Use a shallow depth of field, tilt-shift miniature effect, crisp foreground details, soft background blur, vibrant colors, realistic sunlight and shadows, 4:3 landscape composition, eye-level camera, photorealistic toy-figure diorama aesthetic.
